title: machine fluent interface + anti-compiler
manager: A fluent programmatic API for building a machine in code — chained calls that add states and transitions — plus the anti-compiler that emits FSL source back from a constructed machine. Together they close the loop between code and text: you can build a machine either way and convert freely, which is what lets FSL be both a data structure you manipulate and a language you write.
cs: folds fsl#500 (fluent anti-compiler = emit half, WP-1.10); the fluent interface is the build half, the anti-compiler the emit half
